name: review_stream
description: Stream a structured review of code or a document, with issues and suggestions delivered incrementally. Returns plain text.

content.description: The code or document text to review.

language.description: Programming language (when type is 'code', e.g. 'TypeScript', 'Python', 'Go'). Ignored for non-code types.

focus.description: Review focus areas (e.g. 'correctness, security', 'style, clarity', 'performance'). If omitted, covers all areas.

context.description: Optional context about the codebase, project, or purpose to inform the review.

severity.description: Minimum severity level to report: 'all', 'suggestions-and-above', 'warnings-and-above', 'errors-only'. Default: 'all'.

outputLanguage.description: Language for the review output. If omitted, matches the language of the content or defaults to English.

output.description: The review findings as plain text, delivered incrementally.

errors.message: Input does not conform to the schema.
